channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年7月10日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Show HN: 18 Words #2 AI Content Is Everywhere on Social Media, Especially LinkedIn #3 EU Parliament greenlights Chat Control 1.0 #4 No leap second will be introduced at the end of December 2026 #5 TLS certificates for internal services done right #6 Hy3 #7 A possible future for damn interesting #8 Launch HN: Context.dev (YC S26) – API to get structured data from any website #9 PostHog Open Sourced #10 The glass backbone: Why the Army's logistics will break in the next war

item.title: 2026年7月10日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Show HN: Getting GLM 5.2 running on my slow computer #2 GPT-5.6 #3 EU Parliament greenlights Chat Control 1.0 #4 Why American ambulance rides are so expensive #5 Show HN: 18 Words #6 Interview with Mitchell Hashimoto about Ghostty and Zig #7 Hy3 #8 Train sim created by just one person is being called the best ever made #9 No leap second will be introduced at the end of December 2026 #10 Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests

item.title: 2026年7月9日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Mistral's Robostral Navigate: a state of the art robotics navigation model #2 Decoding the obfuscated bash script on a Uniqlo t-shirt #3 Chatto is now Open Source #4 Cloudflare Meerkat - Globally distributed consensus #5 GitLost: We Tricked GitHub's AI Agent into Leaking Private Repos #6 OpenBSD has a use-after-free allowing local privilege escalation to root #7 Apple to increase spend with Broadcom to produce billions more U.S. chips #8 Show HN: Kastor – Terraform-style specs for AI agents #9 EVE Online's Carbon engine is now open source: Fenris Creations explains why #10 Show HN: Follow London Trains in 3D
